folderLayout.name: sources
folderLayout.purpose: Original source files and copied local evidence files.

folderLayout.name: extracts
folderLayout.purpose: Long extracted text, chunk text, and generated extraction artifacts.

folderLayout.name: attachments
folderLayout.purpose: Images, screenshots, and non-source attached files.

folderLayout.name: quarantine
folderLayout.purpose: Managed exact-byte copies of user-trusted selected files; content access requires external-security acknowledgment and matching registered bytes.

folderLayout.name: discovery
folderLayout.purpose: Managed Discovery metadata artifacts and future deterministic derivatives kept separate from approved Core sources.

folderLayout.name: backups
folderLayout.purpose: User-controlled backup packages separate from primary storage.

folderLayout.name: recovery
folderLayout.purpose: Raw failed loads, failed migrations, and recovery exports.

folderLayout.name: manifests
folderLayout.purpose: Storage manifests, checksums, and integrity reports.

folderLayout.name: integrations
folderLayout.purpose: Machine-local integration configuration and encrypted secrets; excluded from backup and export packages.

tables.name: meta
tables.purpose: Schema version, storage version, settings snapshot, and manifest pointers.

tables.name: actors
tables.purpose: Human and tool actors with roles and status.

tables.name: projects
tables.purpose: Lightweight current project state and project metadata.

tables.name: decisions
tables.purpose: Approved decisions linked to projects.

tables.name: facts
tables.purpose: Approved facts linked to projects and sources.

tables.name: open_questions
tables.purpose: Approved open questions linked to projects.

tables.name: next_actions
tables.purpose: Approved next actions with created, due, completed, and status fields.

tables.name: relationships
tables.purpose: Project and entity relationships using stable IDs.

tables.name: changes
tables.purpose: Append-only change history with actor, timestamp, reason, language, object ID, and readable title.

tables.name: sources
tables.purpose: Source metadata, original local path/reference, managed file path, checksum, tags, and summary.

tables.name: extracts
tables.purpose: Extract metadata and reference to long extract text stored outside project metadata.

tables.name: extract_chunks
tables.purpose: Page, section, message, or size-based chunks for huge files and chat exports.

tables.name: attachments
tables.purpose: Image and attachment metadata with managed file paths and checksums.

tables.name: source_links
tables.purpose: Many-to-many links from sources/extracts/attachments to projects and objects.

tables.name: intake_batches
tables.purpose: Batch imports from APIs, files, folders, chats, notes, AI, or other arms.

tables.name: intake_items
tables.purpose: Individual proposed changes that have not reached Project State.

tables.name: proposed_projects
tables.purpose: Draft project candidates produced from extracts, chunks, AI, or manual intake.

tables.name: proposal_items
tables.purpose: Proposed facts, decisions, questions, actions, relationships, and source links under a proposed project.

tables.name: draft_projects
tables.purpose: Human-review draft project records and review flags.

tables.name: approval_records
tables.purpose: Human approvals, rejections, reasons, and approval scope.

tables.name: recovery_records
tables.purpose: Load, migration, and integrity failure records.

tables.name: file_assets
tables.purpose: Global content-addressed file identities independent of projects.

tables.name: file_versions
tables.purpose: Append-only exact-checksum file versions whose managed bytes remain in Project State managed quarantine or sources storage.

tables.name: discovery_cases
tables.purpose: Resumable pre-routing cases that may exist without a project.

tables.name: discovery_case_files
tables.purpose: Case membership linking exact File Versions without duplicating bytes.

tables.name: discovery_interactions
tables.purpose: Append-only questions, answers, corrections, and non-authoritative suggestions with actor provenance.

tables.name: security_receipts
tables.purpose: Legacy-compatible append-only storage reserved for optional future provider-neutral results; no provider ships with Project State.

tables.name: discovery_events
tables.purpose: Append-only Discovery lineage and processing history.

tables.name: discovery_extractions
tables.purpose: Append-only deterministic extraction attempts with explicit states and exact File Version lineage.

tables.name: discovery_chunks
tables.purpose: Stable checksummed text chunks stored under discovery managed files.

tables.name: idea_analysis_runs
tables.purpose: Provider-neutral analysis scope, coverage, provenance, continuation, and candidate indexes.

tables.name: idea_privacy_authorizations
tables.purpose: Append-only human authorization for exact provider, purpose, chunk hashes, and redaction scope.

tables.name: idea_transmission_receipts
tables.purpose: Append-only records of exact chunks submitted to local or remote analysis arms.

tables.name: ai_analysis_jobs
tables.purpose: Idempotent AI Analysis Arm request lifecycle and validated result metadata.

tables.name: idea_candidates
tables.purpose: Append-only evidence-backed non-authoritative Idea Candidate suggestions.

tables.name: ai_analysis_result_receipts
tables.purpose: Append-only result-page receipts mapping provider candidate IDs to durable Project State candidate IDs.

tables.name: idea_review_decisions
tables.purpose: Append-only human accept, reject, defer, merge, split, rename, correction, duplication, and uncertainty decisions.

tables.name: confirmed_idea_units
tables.purpose: Human-confirmed non-Core Discovery idea units eligible for later project matching and routing review.

largeContentRules: Original source files live in sources/.
Long extract text and chunks live in extracts/.
Images and screenshots live in attachments/.

User-trusted incoming File Versions live in quarantine/ after explicit external-security acknowledgment; API-uploaded retained source files may be linked from sources/ after the same human boundary; Project State performs no malware scan.
Discovery artifacts remain separate from approved Core source material.
SQLite records store IDs, metadata, checksums, and managed paths instead of embedded large content.
safetyRules: Preserve all stable IDs during migration.
Do not write outside arms directly into Project State.
API arms must plug into the desktop app Intake Airlock and must not write directly to Core or Spine.
AI, API output, file reads, chats, and notes create intake or proposal records first.
Human approval is required before proposed records enter core project tables.
Change history is append-only and records actor, timestamp, reason, changed object ID, readable object title, language, and origin.
If load, migration, or integrity checks fail, preserve raw data and enter recovery mode instead of returning a blank store.
Backup location must remain separate from primary storage unless a future server deployment explicitly changes that rule.
Discovery Cases do not require a project.
File Versions, optional legacy Security Receipts, Discovery Interactions, and Discovery Events are append-only.
Every staged content read requires current bytes to match the registered File Version size and SHA-256.
External-security acknowledgment is not a clean or safe verdict.
AI Analysis Arms receive only explicitly human-authorized exact chunks and return non-authoritative Idea Candidates.
Idea Review Decisions are human-only and Confirmed Idea Units remain non-Core until later routing, Intake, and individual approval.
No Discovery storage record grants external arms human approval or Core authority.
